title: 10 best herbal teas for pimples
description: Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, teas helps with pimples because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tea has been shown to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, while its antibacterial compounds help to prevent the growth of bacteria that can cause pimples.
